title: Ramiel
wikitext:
[]: Ramiel             Quote Post by zephyr72 » Fri Jan 26, 2007 4:28 pm Has anyone noticed that ramiel's drill is much, much longer than its main body? How does that work exactly? afterthought - Is the actual drill bit some sort of focused laser, like a lightsaber?

[]: Re: Ramiel             Quote Post by BobBQ » Fri Jan 26, 2007 4:53 pm zephyr72 wrote: Has anyone noticed that ramiel's drill is much, much longer than its main body? How does that work exactly?

[]: Re: Ramiel             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Jan 26, 2007 5:12 pm BobBQ wrote: I suspect the Angel grew it on the fly, using energy from vis S^2 engine and matter bored out of the ground.
